meta_title: How to Calculate Vacation & 13th Salary 2025 | Complete Guide - CalcForgeTools
meta_description: Learn how to calculate CLT vacation pay, constitutional 1/3 bonus, cash conversion, and proportional 13th salary. Guide with tables and formulas.

hero.title: How to Calculate Vacation & 13th Salary
hero.subtitle: The definitive guide to understanding every component of your vacation pay and 13th salary — and knowing if your employer is paying correctly.

related_tools.title: Vacation & 13th Salary Calculator
related_tools.description: Simulate your vacation and 13th salary with cash conversion automatically.

content.text: Vacation exists to restore productivity, not to be a bargaining chip.
content.author: CLT Principle

content.text: Did you know that 1 in 4 Brazilians don't check vacation calculations on their paycheck? And that the famous 'vacation third' is a constitutional right that cannot be negotiated even by collective agreement?
Cash Conversion: To Sell or Not to Sell?

The CLT allows you to convert up to 1/3 of vacation into cash (max 10 of 30 days). On top of these sold days, you also receive the 1/3 bonus. The decision must be communicated to your employer up to 15 days before the end of the accrual period.

content.expression: Proportional 13th = (Salary ÷ 12) × Months Worked in the Year

content.text: The 13th salary is paid in two installments: the first (no deductions) by November 30, and the second (with INSS and IRRF deductions) by December 20. You can request the 1st installment together with your vacation.
